issues.description: Trigger should be 'Counter' not 'OnAttacked'. This is a Counter card.
Missing conditional action: second +2000 power boost only applies 'if you have 15 or more cards in your trash'. Requires condition check.
Entire second effect is wrong. Should be second PowerBoost conditional on TrashCount >= 15, not DrawCard + TrashFromHand.
Target should allow Leader OR Character ('ChooseOwnLeaderOrCharacter' or equivalent), not just Character.
Duration 'EndOfBattle' is correct for 'during this battle', but structure needs conditional second action.
